schueco.name: Schueco SmartTouch
schueco.desc: Mobile control app for Schueco SmartTouch door systems with fingerprint access, remote control, and real-time security monitoring.

details.overview: Mobile control application for Schueco SmartTouch door systems. Developed comprehensive smart door management app allowing users to control, monitor, and configure SmartTouch doors remotely with fingerprint access, real-time status updates, and advanced security features.
details.role: Led iOS development as sole mobile developer. Implemented secure Bluetooth communication with SmartTouch hardware and integrated Touch ID for enhanced security. Designed offline-first architecture for reliable door control.

beleen.name: Beleen
beleen.desc: On-demand cleaning and home services platform. Real-time booking, provider tracking, in-app payments, ratings & review system with push notification support.

details.overview: Full-featured on-demand cleaning and home services platform connecting customers with vetted service providers. Built both the customer-facing and provider-facing iOS applications with real-time tracking and seamless payment integration.
details.role: Developed both customer and provider apps from scratch. Implemented real-time location tracking with optimized battery usage. Integrated Stripe for secure payment processing.

vquarter.name: Vquarter
vquarter.desc: Property listing and real estate marketplace. Map-based property search, virtual tours, mortgage calculator, agent communication, and favorites management.

details.overview: Property listing and real estate marketplace enabling users to search, view, and save properties. Features include interactive map-based search, virtual property tours, mortgage calculations, and direct agent communication channels.
details.role: Architected and built the full iOS app. Implemented custom map clustering for 50k+ listings with smooth 60fps scrolling. Designed offline-capable favorites system.

endava.name: Endava Projects
endava.desc: Multiple enterprise mobile solutions for global clients. Team collaboration, project management, real-time communication, and performance analytics platforms.

details.overview: Multiple enterprise-grade mobile solutions delivered for Endava's global client portfolio. Projects spanned team collaboration, project management, and real-time communication platforms serving thousands of daily active users across multiple continents.
details.role: Senior developer & technical coach. Led architecture decisions across multiple projects. Mentored 5+ junior developers. Established coding standards and review processes adopted across the iOS chapter.

paincheck.name: PainCheck
paincheck.desc: HIPAA-compliant healthcare app for pain tracking, medication reminders, doctor appointments, and health analytics with secure data storage.

details.overview: HIPAA-compliant healthcare application enabling patients to track pain levels, manage medications, schedule doctor appointments, and view personal health analytics. Integrates with Apple HealthKit for comprehensive health data aggregation.
details.role: Sole iOS developer responsible for full app lifecycle. Implemented HIPAA-compliant data storage and transmission. Achieved 4.7 App Store rating.

caregiver.name: Caregiver
caregiver.desc: Comprehensive caregiving app for elderly care. Medication schedules, emergency alerts, activity monitoring, family coordination, GPS tracking & fall detection.

details.overview: Comprehensive caregiving app designed for families managing elderly care. Features include medication management, emergency alerts with automatic location sharing, activity monitoring, and multi-family coordination with role-based access.
details.role: Led mobile development team of 3. Implemented background location tracking with minimal battery impact. Designed the family coordination system supporting up to 10 caregivers per patient.

fss.name: FSS
fss.desc: Enterprise financial management system. Real-time analytics, automated reporting, multi-currency support, and regulatory compliance.

details.overview: Enterprise financial management platform providing real-time portfolio analytics, automated compliance reporting, and multi-currency transaction support. Built for institutional clients handling high-volume financial operations.
details.role: Senior developer focused on security-critical modules. Implemented certificate pinning and end-to-end encryption. Passed 3 independent security audits with zero critical findings.

footballerista.name: Footballerista
footballerista.desc: Social networking platform for athletes. Player profiles, highlights sharing, real-time messaging, and community feed with Firebase integration.

details.overview: Social networking platform built for athletes and football enthusiasts. Features include player profiles with stats, highlight video sharing, real-time team messaging, community feed, and match event tracking powered by Firebase.
details.role: Full-stack mobile developer. Built the entire iOS app from concept to App Store launch. Implemented video compression pipeline reducing upload size by 70% while maintaining quality.

chaty.name: Chaty
chaty.desc: Real-time messaging with E2E encryption, group chats, file sharing, and voice/video calling via WebRTC and Socket.io.

details.overview: Real-time messaging application with end-to-end encryption, supporting individual and group conversations, file sharing, and voice/video calling. Built on WebRTC for peer-to-peer communication with Socket.io signaling.
details.role: Lead iOS developer. Implemented the E2E encryption protocol and WebRTC integration. Optimized real-time message delivery achieving <100ms latency.

openjobs.name: Open Jobs
openjobs.desc: Job search platform connecting seekers with employers. Advanced filters, real-time notifications, application tracking, and profile management.

details.overview: Mobile job search and recruitment platform connecting job seekers with employers. Features advanced multi-criteria search, real-time job alerts, one-tap application flow, and a comprehensive applicant tracking system.
details.role: iOS developer responsible for search and application modules. Built the offline-capable job bookmarking system. Optimized search performance handling 100k+ listings.
